title: The Cross Totem
description: Replaces the Totem of Undying with a Cross (renames it too)
body:
This resource pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a Cross!


**Installation:**

1. Download the zip and place it in your resourcepacks/ folder

2. Enable it in Minecraft
